forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 66, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. South southeast wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 9pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 54, with temperatures rising to around 56 overnight. North northwest wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
